title: paul russells 6ft LED Batten Light, LED Tube Light 60W 6600lm, Ceiling Lighting Daylight 6500K, LED Garage Lighting, Office Ceiling Lights, Workshop & Shed Light, Fluorescent Replacement, 1 Pack
features: 𝐁𝐑𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓 & 𝐄𝐍𝐄𝐑𝐆𝐘-𝐄𝐅𝐅𝐈𝐂𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐓 𝐋𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓𝐈𝐍𝐆: This LED batten light uses only 60W to provide 6600 lumens of bright, Daylight light. It is an excellent replacement for classic fluorescent light tubes in garage lights, ceiling lights, and workshop lights.

They give kitchens, lofts, bathrooms, offices, gyms, and commercial spaces clean, even light, without taking up a lot of space. This LED batten light is made of high-quality polycarbonate and stainless steel, so it works well and lasts for more than 25,000 hours. It may be used all the time in garage and shed lights.

𝐄𝐀𝐒𝐘 𝐌𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐒-𝐏𝐎𝐖𝐄𝐑𝐄𝐃 𝐈𝐍𝐒𝐓𝐀𝐋𝐋𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍: The plug-in LED light bar comes with screws for mounting, screws for expansion, a 15cm power cord, and clear instructions, making it easy to install ceiling LED lights, garage lights, or kitchen lights.

description: Product Description Easy and Swift Installation Save time with included mounting brackets for easy installation of LED battens on walls or ceilings, with no need for fixing tube lights to fixtures. Directly wire to mains for replacing old fluorescent fittings. 2 Different Colour Light Choose between Bright Daylight ( 6500K ) or Natural Cool White ( 4000K ) with these cutting-edge LED battens. Both provide excellent illumination for any room while protecting your eyes with non-flickering lights. WIDE ANGLE LIGHT DISTRIBUTION The 120° wide angle beam promising better light distribution, super brightness and no flickering lighting. SAVE MONEY ON YOUR ENERGY BILLS These LED Linear Batten Lights are energy saving class and a highly efficient 100 lumens per watt ensures sufficient lighting and low cost compared to traditional fluorescent fittings. paul russells LED Linear Batten Integrated Tube Lights, IP20 These integrated batten tube lights feature modern LED technology that delivers high-quality lighting, brightening up your space. With innovative British design and the latest chips, these lights are also incredibly energy-efficient, making them a smart and sustainable lighting solution. Experience the advantages of contemporary LED technology with these innovative integrated batten tube lights. Enjoy exceptional illumination while reducing your energy consumption with these innovative LED lights. Whether you’re looking for the best in LED lighting. paul russells is the brand that you can trust to deliver on quality production and performance. So, Don't waste more time and brighten up your home today. Specifications : IP20 rated NON - DIMMABLE 120° Beam Angle CRI > 80 Cool White (4000K) / Daylight (6500K) Widely Applicable OFFICE USES : Good lighting in your office is crucial for productivity, whether you work at home or in an office. Bright lighting can boost your mood and help you stay focused on your work. A poorly lit room can make you feel tired and unproductive. So, it's important to make sure your workspace is well-lit to help you stay alert and efficient throughout the day. INDUSTRIAL USES : LED batten lights are versatile and can be used in various ways in your industry. You can install them on your ceiling, or below your counters. They offer flexibility and can be adapted to different lighting needs in your industry. BEDROOM USES : LED battens are ideal for creating a cozy and comfortable atmosphere in your bedroom. They can be used as stylish ceiling lights or installed underneath cabinets, providing a warm and inviting ambiance. Remember to adhere to safety precautions and use high IP ratings where required to ensure the safety and functionality of your lights. HALLROOM USES : LED battens are perfect for hallways, offering a sleek and stylish lighting solution that can be installed on ceilings or walls. They provide bright illumination to create a welcoming and inviting atmosphere.
